Hey, this is Todd Brown and welcome to the Six Figure Funnel Formula and congratulations on an awesome decision to build your first Six Figure Plus customer acquisition marketing funnel the right way. Now I'm sure you're eager to jump in and get started with your first module, but before we do that, I very quickly want to tell you a little bit about the Six Figure Funnel Formula. First, what's different about the Six Figure Funnel Formula compared to any other funnel training or marketing funnel resource out there? Well, as I like to say it, the Six Figure Funnel Formula not only gives you the fish, but it also teaches you how to fish so that you can feed yourself for life. What I mean by that is that inside the Six Figure Funnel Formula, you'll not only get a blueprint for a funnel that you can build to acquire new customers, but you'll also learn the strategies and tactics to continue to build additional profitable funnels going forward. Now, everything that you are about to see and learn inside this training center is based on real world testing and results. Everything in here is theory, conjecture, opinion, or speculation. Everything that you are about to learn has been proven and tested in the trenches to produce results. Now, the Six Figure Funnel Formula is really unique because it's not only built on proven advanced marketing funnel principles, but it's really designed so that new and novice marketers can understand and apply everything. You'll find that the most advanced principles are included in the Six Figure Funnel Formula, but it's unique in that it is the first program of its kind to take those advanced marketing funnel principles that have been proven and tested over time and break them down into easily digestible and actionable pieces of content. Let me tell you how the training center is laid out. In fact, let's go over to the training center right now and I'm going to walk you through how to access all of the modules and all of your training resources. Here we are inside the Six Figure Funnel Formula Training and Resource Center. What you'll find first and foremost is that listed down the left-hand side are all of the modules as well as the Ultimate Cheat Sheet Collection and the Resource Directory. At any point, you can click on any one of these and it'll take you direct to the module. For example, if we click on Module 1, what you'll find is that at the beginning of every module there's an introduction that tells you what the module covers. To the right, you'll find the navigation for all of the lessons in this particular module. You'll find a green button that you can click to go to the very next lesson. On the lesson pages, you'll actually find the length of the video, what the video covers. You'll find a link over here to download the video. Underneath the video, you'll find a download link to download the slides from this particular lesson. As well, you've got the navigation for the entire module and then you've got the green button again that you can click on to go to the next lesson. This is the same navigation that you will find in all of the different modules for all of the different lessons. As well, you'll find breadcrumb navigation at the top above each video. At any point, if you want to go back to the introduction for the particular module, you can just click on the module right there and it'll bring you back to the introduction. You can also just click program home and it'll bring you back to the main page. That is how the navigation works for each of the modules. Let's take a look at the Ultimate Cheat Sheet Collection. You can see here that you can download, simply by clicking on any one of these cheat sheets, you can download the individual cheat sheet or just view it right in your browser. At the very bottom, you can also just click this link right here to download a single PDF of the entire collection. That's how the training center is laid out. You'll also find an update on the weekly Q&A calls over here. You'll find other updates as we put them in this section. That's all there is to it. Fairly straightforward training and resource center. At the end of each module, you'll be given a set of what to do next steps. I highly recommend that you go through the entire training, the entire six-figure funnel formula training once and then go back, go through the training a second time. That's when you'll want to perform each of the what to do next steps before going on to the next module. You'll want to go through the six-figure funnel formula training at least once to get a base level understanding of how the whole formula works and fits together so you can see everything in its context. Then you want to go back and you want to follow the instructions of what to do next, do them for each module and then go on to the next module and do the same. Last but not least, I want to give you a quick overview of the six-figure funnel formula map. Here is what you're going to be learning in this training. Don't be overwhelmed or intimidated or look at this thing and freak out. I will be walking you through each and every component step by step. We are literally going to go one piece at a time, break down what it is, why we do it, how to do it and give you very specific easy action steps to take. With that being said, go on to module one.
